title: Homelife for easy living Ripple X-14 1200w Steam Iron/Non-stick Soleplate/Steam or Dry Iron/Water Spray/Adjustable Temperature and Steam Control / 2m long cord / E7304 / Red
features: STEAM, WATER SPRAY AND DRY IRON: With steam, shot of steam, water spray and dry iron functions, this 1200w iron is designed to help remove even the most stubborn creases. With a large 150ml water tank, steam rate of 20g per minute and shot of steam rate at 50g per minute creases don’t stand a chance!

ADJUSTABLE STEAM RATE CONTROL: Tailor to the needs of your garment by adjusting the amount of steam released when the steam button is pressed. A higher setting will cause a large amount of steam to release from the iron whereas lower settings will cause a small, more concentrated release of steam

VARIABLE THERMOSTAT CONTROL DIAL: Adjusting the dial allows you to set the ideal temperature setting depending on the types of fabrics being ironed. Using the dial, choose from the cotton, linen silk and wool settings or set your own temperature. The red pilot lamp will turn off to indicate the correct temperature has been reached. Get the perfect finish every time.
NON-STICK SOLEPATE: The stainless steel soleplate glides easily over fabrics and doesn’t stick, so there’s no worry about damaging garments.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The comfortable ergonomic handle allows for greater stability and control over the iron during use and the 2m cord is ideal for easy manoeuvring. The heel rest allows you to stand the iron vertically to set aside safely.
description: From the manufacturer 50g/min Steam Boost Iron – 150ml Tank, Multi-Function Steam & Spray Compact and versatile, this iron offers steam, vertical steam, dry, and spray options. Delivers a 50g/min steam shot and 20g/min continuous steam for effective wrinkle removal. The 150ml water tank is perfect for quick ironing sessions. 1200W Compact Iron – Non-Stick Soleplate, 1.9m Cord Lightweight and easy to use, this 24cm iron features a non-stick soleplate for smooth gliding. With 1200W of power and a 1.9m cord, it's perfect for quick, everyday ironing. A Trusted Brand Offering a Wide Range of Quality Household Products. From steam irons to vacuum cleaners to torches and outdoor gear, each item is made to be user-friendly, ergonomic and help you get daily tasks done quickly and easily.
